results.compiled_code:
WITH met_artists AS (
    SELECT
        artist_id,
        artist_display_name,
        artist_alpha_sort,
        artist_display_bio,
        artist_nationality,
        artist_begin_date,
        artist_end_date,
        artist_gender,
        artist_ulan_url,
        artist_wikidata_url,
        'met_museum' AS source_system,
        CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS _loaded_at
    FROM ARTWORK_DB.SILVER.STG_MET__ARTISTS
)
SELECT
    MD5(COALESCE(CAST(artist_alpha_sort AS TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || COALESCE(CAST(artist_ulan_url AS TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || COALESCE(CAST('met_museum' AS TEXT), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_'))
        AS artist_id,
    artist_display_name,
    artist_alpha_sort,
    artist_display_bio,
    artist_nationality,
    artist_begin_date,
    artist_end_date,
    artist_gender,
    artist_ulan_url,
    artist_wikidata_url,
    source_system,
    _loaded_at
FROM met_artists
